summary: Business operations and program analyst experienced in executive reporting, meeting follow-through, stakeholder coordination, budget and resource tracking, workflow improvement, documentation control, and analytics-driven delivery across revenue operations, SaaS, financial modeling, and business systems environments.

experiences.title: Revenue Operations, Governance & Controls Analyst
bullets: Coordinated reporting inputs, timelines, documentation, governance requirements, and stakeholder follow-through, improving leadership visibility across enterprise initiatives.

Improved business systems flow across Finance, Revenue Operations, Systems, Sales Operations, M&A, Audit, and Customer Service, clarifying ownership, dependencies, and progress across 13 enterprise initiatives.
Built portfolio governance and milestone trackers, sustaining 85% of supported deliverables in green status.

Translated V2MOM priorities, PAM findings, QBR insights, and operational risks into strategic roadmaps, measurable initiatives, and governance decisions supporting cash flow, compliance, automation, and customer experience.
Developed executive roadmap for financial control automation, creating repeatable pathways for new control requirements and compliance documentation.

Coordinated approved BPI implementations with operations leaders, Systems teams, reporting partners, SMEs, process owners, and frontline stakeholders to strengthen execution clarity and reduce process friction.

experiences.title: Revenue Strategy & Financial Analysis Analyst
bullets: Coordinated project plans, timelines, documentation, and executive-ready progress reporting between senior leaders and cross-functional teams.

Translated executive priorities into actionable workstreams, risk updates, and business impact summaries, keeping senior decision-makers connected to technical progress, company goals, delivery tradeoffs, and execution risks through updates.
Created reports and visualizations from property analysis, improving decision support for internal teams and clients.

experiences.title: Business Systems & Revenue Data Analyst
bullets: Coordinated project execution across development, sales, marketing, and leadership teams, aligning priorities with delivery activity.

Supported SaaS operating systems across product, finance, internal workflows, and growth initiatives, strengthening execution structure, business analysis coverage, and scalable delivery in a startup environment.
Analyzed property data with SQL, improving listing alignment and contributing to 22% customer retention growth.

experiences.title: Analytics, Automation & Operations Analyst
bullets: Managed scope, budgets, resources, timelines, and delivery risks while negotiating priorities with executive leadership.

Owned product execution by defining requirements, prioritizing roadmaps, coordinating development activities, and tracking JIRA milestones to convert a business opportunity into a scalable analytics platform.
Improved client experience by aligning product workflows, analytics outputs, and service communication with client needs.
Led sprint planning, backlog prioritization, and JIRA execution tracking to strengthen delivery visibility, coordinate development activity, and keep product work aligned with business priorities.

experiences.title: BI, Data Quality & Systems Analyst
bullets: Led Agile SDLC coordination, backlog prioritization, Scrum practices, and risk tracking, improving efficiency 60%.

Standardized testing processes through repeatable documentation, validation workflows, defect reports, and quality practices, improving consistency, traceability, and control across application delivery cycles for client-facing release readiness.
Built Tableau visualizations and root cause analyses to clarify system issues, bottlenecks, quality trends, and reporting deliverables.
Connected quality engineering, root cause analysis, and performance insights to business outcomes, identifying system improvements that contributed to a projected $1M client revenue increase.
